---
title: "Gigi Mordock"
about:
  template: solana
  image: Mordock-Headshot.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/gsmordock
---

Gigi Mordock is currently finishing her B.A. and preparing to begin with the Teaching Credential Program in the fall. When not interacting with educational and mathematics content, Gigi enjoys reading, listening to music, and watching sports.

## Education

California State University, Fullerton \| Fullerton, CA B.A in Mathematics (Probability and Statistics Concentration) \| Aug 2022 - May 2026

## Experience

Transitioning Mathematics Majors into Teaching \| Scholar \| Aug 2023 - May 2026
